name: Apogee Opportunities Inc.
description: Apogee Opportunities Inc., formerly Apogee Minerals Ltd., is a Canada-based exploration-stage company. The Company is engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties, with a primary focus on silver, lead, and zinc projects in South America, particularly in Bolivia and Chile. Its key projects have historically included the Pulacayo-Paca silver-lead-zinc project in Bolivia.
